text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The annual summer training camp has begun. Although I designed
Satono Diamond's regimen to be demanding, she's tackling it with
enthusiasm.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Phew! My time improved again. I'm not that tired either—does that mean my stamina's gotten better too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It has, which means it's the perfect time to build even more. I ask her
which exercise she'd rather do next.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Well, since it's hot out, swimming sounds...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I mean, um... What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something's definitely up. She's been acting a little awkward since
our trip to the amusement park.

text_block_list.name: Trendy Student
text_block_list.text: Wait, there's a festival happening tonight?! Oh, I am so down! Let's all go together!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: A festival? Oh, that sounds fun!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ah! I mean, um...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh! Is that all right?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wow! It's so lively! And look at all the different stalls!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what's that one? They're scooping... not goldfish, but sparkly
balls?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Stall Owner
text_block_list.text: Step right up, step right up! Scoop as many sparkly balls as you can!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Um, are we supposed to use a bowl?
choice_data_list: No, you use a paper scoop.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Scoop? Oh, you mean that small round one!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But the paper's so thin. How do you stop it from tearing? Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, you don't have to—

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wow! That was amazing—you got a really big one!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: U-um, you're getting really into this.
choice_data_list: I'm happy when you rely on me.
I'm happy when you rely on me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Happy? Do you mean that? I'm not just bothering you?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Um, I-I...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I want to be honest around you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That is, um... if I'm open about how I feel, would that be a burden on
you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Satono Diamond has been holding back for my sake.
She doesn't need to do that, though, because...
choice_data_list: Your honesty is your greatest strength.
Your honesty is your greatest strength.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: My greatest strength?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (Oh. So that's how Trainer sees it...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (Of course. It was the same back then, too.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Be honest with me. At this rate, will I stand a chance?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Honestly? It... wouldn't even be close.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I knew it...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(As direct as I am, you always respond in kind. That's how we've come
so far together.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I can't believe I forgot something so important.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once we've moved away from the hustle and bustle, Satono Diamond
confesses what's been weighing on her mind.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You know how I don't hesitate to voice my thoughts, or act on them? I
realized that could be inconsiderate, so I got worried.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That's why I thought I had to hold back. Just like the other day...
choice_data_list: You mean at the amusement park?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The truth is, I was overjoyed at the prize you won for me. I
wanted to get you one too, so we'd have a matching pair...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But when it occurred to me you might not want it, I couldn't bring
myself to say it.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I should've just been honest, right?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course! It's a promise! I'll think of somewhere for us to go!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You'd better brace yourself. Since you said honesty was my greatest
strength, I won't hold back anymore!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll suggest all manner of strange places and exciting things to
do—and you'll come along for the ride, won't you?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Thank you. There's no one I can count on more—oh!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes... They really are!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fireworks continue to light up the night sky. We can see them well
enough here, but...
choice_data_list: Let's head back and get a better look!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Don't go...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Satono Diamond catches up and tugs on my sleeve.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I want to watch from here, just the two of us!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: So don't go. Stay with me, just for a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. Right now, those are my honest feelings! You don't mind, do
you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond pulls me over to a place on the beach where we can
sit side by side. Together, we watch the distant fireworks bloom into
the night.
